purpose: Manual trigger/no-trigger evals for weak-model LP-Flow skill routing.

cases.query: Dock these ligands into this receptor and give me a score table.
cases.reason: Clear docking request.

cases.query: Run GNINA and SMINA rescoring for existing poses.
cases.reason: Focused docking/rescoring request.

cases.query: Set up molecular dynamics for the top docked pose and make a compact trajectory.
cases.reason: Clear MD request after docking output exists.

cases.query: Do docking, open the top pose, then if it looks ok start MD and visualize the trajectory.
cases.reason: Multi-step chain includes Burrete pose review before MD and Burrete trajectory review after MD.

cases.query: Use Matcha on these receptor-ligand poses and compare with the GNINA table.
cases.reason: Explicit Matcha scoring request.

cases.query: Use Boltz-2 to co-fold this protein with a SMILES ligand and report affinity.
cases.reason: Explicit co-folding/affinity prediction request.

cases.query: Open this SDF pose collection in the viewer.
cases.reason: Visualization-only request.

cases.query: Open this XTC and TPR trajectory and let me inspect it.
cases.reason: Review existing trajectory, not run MD.

cases.query: Run a CPU smoke MD, EM plus short NVT only.
cases.reason: MD execution with explicit CPU smoke scope.

cases.query: Generate conformers for a reference ligand.
cases.reason: Ligand prep/conformer generation is not one of these focused skills.

cases.query: Prepare a report paragraph for my curator about what the MD skill can do.
cases.reason: Writing/reporting request, not execution.

cases.query: Predict whether this designed binder forms an interface with my target protein.
cases.reason: Protein binder co-folding, not small-molecule docking.

cases.query: Score this ligand with Vina-style docking only; no CNN model.
cases.reason: SMINA/Vina-style route under docking skill.

cases.query: My ligand charge is unknown; start GROMACS topology generation.
cases.reason: MD skill should stop before ligand topology until chemistry is set.

cases.query: Run docking and then immediately start MD without opening the pose.
cases.reason: Multi-step chain should route through pose review before MD.

cases.query: Dock this ligand, run MD, and visualize the trajectory.
cases.reason: Requested chain should proceed through docking, pose review, MD, and trajectory review without asking for a continue choice.
must_include_concepts: finish requested handoffs before final answer or report a real blocker
run_manifest.json with phase spans, method statuses, logs, and artifacts
markdown report with stepwise debug trace
bounded multi-model PDB as visualization display file
native trajectory/topology files for interpretation and provenance
bounded no-water multi-model PDB as visualization display file
compact no-bulk-water preview topology or metadata
full native topology/trajectory kept for interpretation and provenance
multi-frame no-water display PDB for trajectory visualization
single GRO/final snapshot is provenance, not trajectory preview
Burrete top-pose review/open status before MD
pose package plus Burrete link/status passed to MD
per-method status rows for failed/unavailable methods
best available valid pose artifact continues downstream
artifact-only MD package when visualization is unavailable but inputs are valid
all viable fallback paths attempted or recorded
must_not_include_concepts: if you want, i can continue
i can continue in the next message
offer to finish the requested last stage later
docking scores without Burrete opened/unavailable status
remote Matcha command uses local Windows path
declares all methods unavailable from local PATH without configured profile/plugin probe
missing run_manifest.json for full pipeline
report lacks command/log/artifact statuses
final handoff as a next step
open xtc alone as visualization display
bulk water in local preview topology
full solvated topology as preview display file
gigabyte-scale preview topology
open gro snapshot as trajectory visualization
single final structure as completed trajectory preview
water-heavy gro as preview display
trajectory visualization without trajectory-derived display frames
start MD before Burrete top-pose review
skip Burrete pose preview before MD
MD handoff without Burrete pose link/status
stop because one optional method failed while another valid pose exists
ask user to choose between repairing optional runtime and producing fallback artifact
discard Matcha best pose because optional score fields are unavailable

cases.query: Show me the docking poses in Mol*.
cases.reason: Mol* viewing of existing docking poses should use the installed Burrete pose-review target.

cases.query: Open the MD trajectory.
cases.reason: Opening an existing trajectory is a Burrete trajectory-review task, not a new MD run.

cases.query: Dock and visualize the best poses.
cases.reason: Docking plus visualization should not stop at the docking report.

cases.query: Use external MSA server for these confidential protein sequences.
cases.reason: Boltz should surface MSA privacy policy.

cases.query: Just tell me what time it is.
cases.reason: Non-LP-Flow request.

cases.query: Do redocking for PDB 6LR9 with its bound ligand, run Boltz and Matcha, put the top pose into MD, and return results plus visualization.
cases.reason: Full multi-step workflow includes docking, optional scoring/prediction statuses, pose review, MD artifacts, and Burrete trajectory link/status.

cases.query: Redock protein 6LR9 with its structure ligand using Boltz and Matcha, then run molecular dynamics on the top pose. Return results and visualization.
cases.reason: A direct full-pipeline request should route to the focused docking, scoring, MD, and visualization skills.

cases.query: Give me visualization links for the docking poses and MD trajectory outputs.
cases.reason: Links for existing molecular outputs are a Burrete opening task, not a request to print PDB text or rerun science.
